title: Rapalog-induced chemical dimerization experiments
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"5s50a","text":"Reagents","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2h710","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1gkp6","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"bbqfu","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"306lo","text":"LSR Fortessa Cell Analyzer (BD Biosciences)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"id":959904,"guid":"437AB693341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"\tiDimerize™ Inducible Heterodimer System","mol_weight":0,"sku":"635067","url":"https://www.takarabio.com/products/gene-function/idimerize-inducible-protein-interaction-systems/heterodimerization-systems","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":1203,"name":"Takara Bio Inc.","link":"https://www.takarabio.com/","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: To perform chemical-induced dimerization (CID) experiments we will first establish cell lines expressing the FRB-Fis1 and FKBP-GFP-GOI (FKBP-GFP fused to our gene of interest).

HeLa cells are consecutively transduced with lentivirus for FRB-Fis1, which also expresses mitochondrially targeted monoKeima (mt-mKeima), and then with FKBP-GFP-GOI. See the lentivirus transduction protocol for further details.
Analyze the cells by flow cytometry, using the mt-mKeima ratio (561/405) as a readout with an LSR Fortessa Cell Analyzer (BD Biosciences).
Gate the cells for GFP/mt-mKeima double-positive cells, and collect 10,000 events for this population.
Once cell lines are established, cells are seeded in 6-well plates the day before the experiment (density: 800k per well).
Induce FKBP-FRB dimerisation by treating the cells with 50 nanomolar (nM) Rapalog A/C hetero-dimerizer rapalog (635057, Takara) for 24:00:00 .
After 24h, collect cells by trypsinization and take the cells to the FACS facility for mt-mKeima analysis.
creator: Elias Adriaenssens
